title: Sort the boards inside of a dashboard Gantt
excerpt: Hi , we would like to have the possibility to sort and re-arrange the boards connected to a dashboard in the Gantt widget , as priority and timeline shift , we want to be able to always show the priority first ,and show …

posts.author: Ghita (Ghita)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi , we would like to have the possibility to sort and re-arrange the boards connected to a dashboard in the Gantt widget , as priority and timeline shift , we want to be able to always show the priority first ,and show the project that will end first in the portfolio Dashboard

thanks

posts.author: najoconsulting (Neal Altman)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love this as well. looks like a lot of people have asked with no resolution.

posts.author: RossD (Ross Doak)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any update on this ?

posts.author: jcvaladez (Justice Valadez)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like this feature. It seems fundamental? Hoping this is in the works.
